input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.2.2
            TITLE: when the shutdown circuit opens, it must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.2.2: When the Shutdown Circuit Opens, it must:
IC.9.2.2 When the Shutdown Circuit Opens, it must: 
a. Stop the engine 
b. Disconnect power to the: 
• Fuel Pump(s) 
• Ignition 
• (ETC only) Electronic Throttle  IC.4.1.1

final_answer: IC.9.2.2 When the Shutdown Circuit Opens, it must: a. Stop the engine b. Disconnect power to the: • Fuel Pump(s) • Ignition • (ETC only) Electronic Throttle
